data.title: Donald Trump To Be Named TIME Person Of The Year, Beating Out Harris, Musk, Middleton, Netanyahu: Report
data.description: Donald Trump to be named TIME Person of the Year award for 2024 according to a report and will ring the NYSE opening bell to celebrate Thursday.

data.title: $1000 Invested In This Stock 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
If You Invested $1000 In This Stock 15 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
US Airlines Set To Fly High In 2025, Analyst Says: 'Perfect Storm Of Tailwinds' Will Propel Industry Gains
data.description: Morgan Stanley expects positive momentum on U.S. airline industry to extend into 2025, driven by premium carriers.

data.title: Chewy Stock Slides As Investors Digest $500M Offering From Largest Shareholder
data.description: Chewy shares are moving lower in Wednesday's after-hours session after the company announced a public offering by a selling stockholder and a concurrent share repurchase.
